title: International Electronic Machines Corp ransomware incident

extortion.description: On this blessed day we are sharing with you that another company is going to celebrate the New Year with their data on our blog. International Electronic Machines develops, produces and markets innovative imaging, optical and other sensor-based systems for safety and security applications for intelligent transportation system applications. 16Gb of data will be uploaded early next year. Many HR files with personal information, IP, project files and so on.
